main.name: Bilal Ahmed
main.shortDesc: I build scalable AI-powered systems and modern web applications, with a focus on LLM integration, backend architecture, and high performance full-stack solutions that drive real business impact.

about.title: Senior AI Engineer
about.summary: Senior AI Engineer with over 5+ years of hands-on experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable, high-performance AI-driven systems and intelligent web applications. Specialized in Large Language Models (LLMs), backend architecture, and full-stack development, with expertise in technologies including React, Node.js, ASP.NET Core, .NET, C#, PostgreSQL, and AWS. Proven ability to build secure, reliable, and production-ready solutions, integrating AI capabilities into real-world applications to drive business value. Adept at writing clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to modern design patterns and best practices. Experienced in agile environments, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative, data-driven solutions that enhance user experience and operational efficiency. Passionate about solving complex technical challenges, advancing AI capabilities, and continuously exploring emerging technologies to deliver impactful and scalable solutions.
currentFocus: Designing and deploying scalable AI-driven systems and applications leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and modern full-stack architectures
Optimizing backend performance for AI workloads through efficient data pipelines, caching strategies, vector databases, and high-performance .NET and Node.js services
Building and integrating intelligent APIs (REST/GraphQL) with AI capabilities, following clean architecture and microservices principles
Developing AI-enhanced user experiences, including conversational interfaces, semantic search, and personalized features
Managing cloud-native AI deployments using AWS, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines, ensuring reliability, scalability, and production readiness
Exploring advanced AI systems including autonomous agents, multi-agent orchestration, LLM evaluation frameworks, and AI safety/guardrails for production-grade reliability
achievements: Delivered 10+ production-ready AI-enabled full-stack applications for global clients, integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into React, Node.js, and ASP.NET Core ecosystems
Automated complex business workflows and reduced manual effort by up to 40% using AI-driven solutions, including intelligent dashboards, NLP pipelines, and decision-support systems
Enhanced system performance and scalability by up to 60% through optimized backend architectures, caching strategies, vector search integration, and efficient .NET/Node.js services
Led end-to-end design and deployment of AI-powered products, implementing clean architecture, microservices, and LLM-based features such as semantic search and conversational interfaces
Deployed scalable, secure, and cost-efficient AI systems on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, CloudWatch), ensuring high availability, observability, and production-grade reliability
